name: Spicy Cranberry Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle pork chops lightly with salt and pepper; place in 12x8" baking dish; cover dish with plastic wrap; do not vent. Cook at medium-low power (30%) for 16 minutes, turning chops over and rotating the dish a half turn after 10 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine cranberry sauce, raisins, brown sugar, vinegar, orange juice, cinnamon, orange peel, and 1/2 teaspoon salt.
3. Drain and discard accumulated cooking liquid from the baking dish. Spoon the cranberry-sauce mixture onto pork chops; cover dish with plastic wrap; do not vent. Cook at medium-low for 6-8 minutes until meat loses its pink color and is tender.
